items.briefing:
The Australian Cyber Security Centre (ACSC) has issued a warning about credential exposure affecting Fortinet firewalls and VPN gateways — if your organisation uses these products, IT teams should check for any unauthorised access and consider resetting credentials as a priority. Separately, a Cloudflare report highlights a rise in cyberattacks targeting civil society organisations globally, with Australian organisations among those affected — a reminder that no sector is too small to be targeted.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation uses Fortinet VPN or firewall products, contact your IT provider today to confirm whether your systems may be affected and whether credentials need to be changed.

featured.title: ACSC warns of reported credential exposure affecting Fortinet firewalls and VPN gateways
featured.quote: ACSC warns of widespread credential exposure affecting Fortinet firewalls used by Australian organisations nationwide.
